TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wahe'i go mki sku Taycyo Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,006.12 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 900.79 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.11 km²), 6,503 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,544 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,838 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 59%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. qalang Pasing hiya ga te qutux siysyacyu nqu Taycyu, cyux maki squ mskura htgan wagi nqu Taycyu, ssquliq nya ga kbhul rum spat mang kinkhmay. qalang Pasing hiya ga spazyang hopa rhzyal nya, spzyang ini khmay ssquliq nya ru ini ksu'ut na qalang. spazyang hopa rhzyal nya ga, yasa qutux nanak zisyasi "qalang 'Tayal rgayx". kinlabang rhyal nya ga yasa qutux nanak muru qutux seng pingxwang kongli nqu zisyacyu te Taywan. ru lpgun kwara "syang, cyen, syang, syeng syasi", "sisyacyu" ga, te payat qu pinkgan nya. qalang Pasing hiya ga zisyasi qalang 'Tayal rgayx, skahul "tibang zto xwa" mita ga kya kongbazun qu sinpangan nya nqu tibangc_ctwanti, mtnaq sa syang cyensi qu qpzing na mrhuw nya. ays ptyaw sebu Wahe'i go ays psgayun 8 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Sqoyaw , Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . rekisi maki na Gipun, ubuy nqu Taycu syu Tongsi cun xwanti, kwara smryut zyuwaw sexu' ga kinsat qu mtzyuwa.suru mpciriq se Gipun qu Swangci sw na 'Tayal pslwan nha' "motengling ci_iy" lga, qhlun nha musa'msqun maki'sa cyugal qalang bzinah ka "maybuping, cyolyangci ki Slamaw", ru mpu mqeru'hasiyo, mpu sya, teta nha'mblaq mlahang ma'. Kawas 1945, sbahun nha' m'iyuw sa Taycyu syeng Tongsi cyu Hoping syang. kya qalang Pasing, Tyenlun, Poay, Ciyo, Takwan, Cyonkng, Slamaw ru Pingtng mspat kwara' nya'. Kawas 1949 te cyugal byacing, squnun nha' sa iyushan cyu nqu Shini syang ki nqu nkaw nqu Ren'ai syang squ Cuwngbong cyu, sbahun nha' m'iyuw sa Taycu syeng Cuwngbong cyu ru Hoping syang. Kawsa 1950, smryut sincng cyu_iy ki qalang inlaxan, ru sbahul nha m'iyuw nqu Taycu syeng Hoping syang. Kawas 1973, Slamaw nqu Hoping syang, qalang Pingtng tbcyun nha' smi' squ "Lisan cyensye kwanli cuy". Kawas 1980 te mpu sazing byacing te sazing ryax ru muah m'iyuw maki' sa Hoping syang lozi. Kawas 2010 te mpu sazing byacing te mpusal magal ryax, yalaw gi msqun mqutux cisya si qu Taycyong syeng ki Taycyong si. ru gmlu m'iyuw Taycyong si Hoping cyu, ru si glu ungat qu lalu' nya' ka "tibang zici" ru "tibang zici tiwe twnti" la. tuqi qsya spyang na gong hya ga "gong Tacya" ki "gong Ta'an". rhzyal kki'an qalang Pasing maki sa tongpyen nqu Taycyu. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Miaoli syeng cwolan, Tai'an, Sincik syeng Nahuy, Gilan syeng Tatong ka skahul Tongpyen ru sipen. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Hwalan syeng Bsuring, Nan'to syeng Kwosing ka skahul Tongpyen ru Nanpyen. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Sinsye ru Tongsi ka sipen.
S.PHON: waħeʔi ɣo mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa te qutux s~ɕijs~ɕjaʦ~ʨju nqu tajʦ~ʨju, ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu ms~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi nqu tajʦ~ʨju, s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja ɣa kβħul rum s~ɕpat maŋ kinkħmaj. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa s~ɕpazjaŋ ħopa rħzjal nja, s~ɕpzjaŋ ini kħmaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja ru ini ks~ɕuʔut na qalaŋ. s~ɕpazjaŋ ħopa rħzjal nja ɣa, jas~ɕa qutux nanak zis~ɕjas~ɕi "qalaŋ ʔtajal rɣajx". kinlaβaŋ rħjal nja ɣa jas~ɕa qutux nanak muru qutux s~ɕeŋ piŋxwaŋ koŋli nqu zis~ɕjaʦ~ʨju te tajwan. ru lpɣun kwara "s~ɕjaŋ, ʦ~ʨjen, s~ɕjaŋ, s~ɕjeŋ s~ɕjas~ɕi", "s~ɕis~ɕjaʦ~ʨju" ɣa, te pajat qu pinkɣan nja. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa zis~ɕjas~ɕi qalaŋ ʔtajal rɣajx, s~ɕkaħul "tiβaŋ zto xwa" mita ɣa kja koŋβazun qu s~ɕinpaŋan nja nqu tiβaŋʦ~ʨəʦ~ʨtwanti, mtnaq s~ɕa s~ɕjaŋ ʦ~ʨjens~ɕi qu qpziŋ na mrħuw nja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu waħeʔi ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, s~ɕqojaw , taβuk , s~ɕlamaw , lilaŋ , mʔiħu , tɣβin , lʔolu , kliŋ , pas~ɕiŋ , s~ɕlamaw , tβulan , s~ɕʔjux , ħruŋ . rekis~ɕi maki na ɣipun, uβuj nqu tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕju toŋs~ɕi ʦ~ʨun xwanti, kwara s~ɕmrjut zjuwaw s~ɕexuʔ ɣa kins~ɕat qu mtzjuwa.s~ɕuru mpʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕe ɣipun qu s~ɕwaŋʦ~ʨi s~ɕw na ʔtajal ps~ɕlwan nħaʔ "moteŋliŋ ʦ~ʨiəij" lɣa, qħlun nħa mus~ɕaʔms~ɕqun makiʔs~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qalaŋ βzinaħ ka "majβupiŋ, ʦ~ʨjoljaŋʦ~ʨi ki s~ɕlamaw", ru mpu mqeruʔħas~ɕijo, mpu s~ɕja, teta nħaʔmβlaq mlaħaŋ maʔ. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕβaħun nħaʔ mʔijuw s~ɕa tajʦ~ʨju s~ɕjeŋ toŋs~ɕi ʦ~ʨju ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kja qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ, tjenlun, poaj, ʦ~ʨijo, takwan, ʦ~ʨjonkŋ, s~ɕlamaw ru piŋtŋ ms~ɕpat kwaraʔ njaʔ. kawas~ɕ **** te ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, s~ɕqunun nħaʔ s~ɕa ijus~ɕħan ʦ~ʨju nqu s~ɕħini s~ɕjaŋ ki nqu nkaw nqu renʔai s~ɕjaŋ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨuwŋβoŋ ʦ~ʨju, s~ɕβaħun nħaʔ mʔijuw s~ɕa tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕjeŋ ʦ~ʨuwŋβoŋ ʦ~ʨju ru ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kaws~ɕa ****, s~ɕmrjut s~ɕinʦ~ʨŋ ʦ~ʨjuəij ki qalaŋ inlaxan, ru s~ɕβaħul nħa mʔijuw nqu tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕjeŋ ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕlamaw nqu ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ, qalaŋ piŋtŋ tβʦ~ʨjun nħaʔ s~ɕmiʔ s~ɕqu "lis~ɕan ʦ~ʨjens~ɕje kwanli ʦ~ʨuj". kawas~ɕ **** te mpu s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te s~ɕaziŋ rjax ru muaħ mʔijuw makiʔ s~ɕa ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ lozi. kawas~ɕ **** te mpu s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te mpus~ɕal maɣal rjax, jalaw ɣi ms~ɕqun mqutux ʦ~ʨis~ɕja s~ɕi qu tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕjeŋ ki tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕi. ru ɣmlu mʔijuw tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕi ħopiŋ ʦ~ʨju, ru s~ɕi ɣlu uŋat qu laluʔ njaʔ ka "tiβaŋ ziʦ~ʨi" ru "tiβaŋ ziʦ~ʨi tiwe twnti" la. tuqi qs~ɕja s~ɕpjaŋ na ɣoŋ ħja ɣa "ɣoŋ taʦ~ʨja" ki "ɣoŋ taʔan". rħzjal kkiʔan qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ maki s~ɕa toŋpjen nqu tajʦ~ʨju. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki miaoli s~ɕjeŋ ʦ~ʨwolan, taiʔan, s~ɕinʦ~ʨik s~ɕjeŋ naħuj, ɣilan s~ɕjeŋ tatoŋ ka s~ɕkaħul toŋpjen ru s~ɕipen. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki ħwalan s~ɕjeŋ βs~ɕuriŋ, nanʔto s~ɕjeŋ kwos~ɕiŋ ka s~ɕkaħul toŋpjen ru nanpjen. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki s~ɕins~ɕje ru toŋs~ɕi ka s~ɕipen.
S.FORM: Wahe'i go mki sku Taycyo Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,006.12 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 900.79 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.11 km²), 6,503 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,544 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,838 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 59%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. qalang Pasing hiya ga te qutux siysyacyu nqu Taycyu, cyux maki squ mskura htgan wagi nqu Taycyu, ssquliq nya ga kbhul rum spat mang kinkhmay. qalang Pasing hiya ga spazyang hopa rhzyal nya, spzyang ini khmay ssquliq nya ru ini ksu'ut na qalang. spazyang hopa rhzyal nya ga, yasa qutux nanak zisyasi "qalang 'Tayal rgayx". kinlabang rhyal nya ga yasa qutux nanak muru qutux seng pingxwang kongli nqu zisyacyu te Taywan. ru lpgun kwara "syang, cyen, syang, syeng syasi", "sisyacyu" ga, te payat qu pinkgan nya. qalang Pasing hiya ga zisyasi qalang 'Tayal rgayx, skahul "tibang zto xwa" mita ga kya kongbazun qu sinpangan nya nqu tibangc_ctwanti, mtnaq sa syang cyensi qu qpzing na mrhuw nya. ays ptyaw sebu Wahe'i go ays psgayun 8 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Sqoyaw , Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . rekisi maki na Gipun, ubuy nqu Taycu syu Tongsi cun xwanti, kwara smryut zyuwaw sexu' ga kinsat qu mtzyuwa.suru mpciriq se Gipun qu Swangci sw na 'Tayal pslwan nha' "motengling ci_iy" lga, qhlun nha musa'msqun maki'sa cyugal qalang bzinah ka "maybuping, cyolyangci ki Slamaw", ru mpu mqeru'hasiyo, mpu sya, teta nha'mblaq mlahang ma'. Kawas 1945, sbahun nha' m'iyuw sa Taycyu syeng Tongsi cyu Hoping syang. kya qalang Pasing, Tyenlun, Poay, Ciyo, Takwan, Cyonkng, Slamaw ru Pingtng mspat kwara' nya'. Kawas 1949 te cyugal byacing, squnun nha' sa iyushan cyu nqu Shini syang ki nqu nkaw nqu Ren'ai syang squ Cuwngbong cyu, sbahun nha' m'iyuw sa Taycu syeng Cuwngbong cyu ru Hoping syang. Kawsa 1950, smryut sincng cyu_iy ki qalang inlaxan, ru sbahul nha m'iyuw nqu Taycu syeng Hoping syang. Kawas 1973, Slamaw nqu Hoping syang, qalang Pingtng tbcyun nha' smi' squ "Lisan cyensye kwanli cuy". Kawas 1980 te mpu sazing byacing te sazing ryax ru muah m'iyuw maki' sa Hoping syang lozi. Kawas 2010 te mpu sazing byacing te mpusal magal ryax, yalaw gi msqun mqutux cisya si qu Taycyong syeng ki Taycyong si. ru gmlu m'iyuw Taycyong si Hoping cyu, ru si glu ungat qu lalu' nya' ka "tibang zici" ru "tibang zici tiwe twnti" la. tuqi qsya spyang na gong hya ga "gong Tacya" ki "gong Ta'an". rhzyal kki'an qalang Pasing maki sa tongpyen nqu Taycyu. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Miaoli syeng cwolan, Tai'an, Sincik syeng Nahuy, Gilan syeng Tatong ka skahul Tongpyen ru sipen. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Hwalan syeng Bsuring, Nan'to syeng Kwosing ka skahul Tongpyen ru Nanpyen. qalang Pasing ga msobih ki Sinsye ru Tongsi ka sipen.
S.PHON: waħeʔi ɣo mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa te qutux s~ɕijs~ɕjaʦ~ʨju nqu tajʦ~ʨju, ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu ms~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi nqu tajʦ~ʨju, s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja ɣa kβħul rum s~ɕpat maŋ kinkħmaj. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa s~ɕpazjaŋ ħopa rħzjal nja, s~ɕpzjaŋ ini kħmaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja ru ini ks~ɕuʔut na qalaŋ. s~ɕpazjaŋ ħopa rħzjal nja ɣa, jas~ɕa qutux nanak zis~ɕjas~ɕi "qalaŋ ʔtajal rɣajx". kinlaβaŋ rħjal nja ɣa jas~ɕa qutux nanak muru qutux s~ɕeŋ piŋxwaŋ koŋli nqu zis~ɕjaʦ~ʨju te tajwan. ru lpɣun kwara "s~ɕjaŋ, ʦ~ʨjen, s~ɕjaŋ, s~ɕjeŋ s~ɕjas~ɕi", "s~ɕis~ɕjaʦ~ʨju" ɣa, te pajat qu pinkɣan nja. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ħija ɣa zis~ɕjas~ɕi qalaŋ ʔtajal rɣajx, s~ɕkaħul "tiβaŋ zto xwa" mita ɣa kja koŋβazun qu s~ɕinpaŋan nja nqu tiβaŋʦ~ʨəʦ~ʨtwanti, mtnaq s~ɕa s~ɕjaŋ ʦ~ʨjens~ɕi qu qpziŋ na mrħuw nja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu waħeʔi ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, s~ɕqojaw , taβuk , s~ɕlamaw , lilaŋ , mʔiħu , tɣβin , lʔolu , kliŋ , pas~ɕiŋ , s~ɕlamaw , tβulan , s~ɕʔjux , ħruŋ . rekis~ɕi maki na ɣipun, uβuj nqu tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕju toŋs~ɕi ʦ~ʨun xwanti, kwara s~ɕmrjut zjuwaw s~ɕexuʔ ɣa kins~ɕat qu mtzjuwa.s~ɕuru mpʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕe ɣipun qu s~ɕwaŋʦ~ʨi s~ɕw na ʔtajal ps~ɕlwan nħaʔ "moteŋliŋ ʦ~ʨiəij" lɣa, qħlun nħa mus~ɕaʔms~ɕqun makiʔs~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qalaŋ βzinaħ ka "majβupiŋ, ʦ~ʨjoljaŋʦ~ʨi ki s~ɕlamaw", ru mpu mqeruʔħas~ɕijo, mpu s~ɕja, teta nħaʔmβlaq mlaħaŋ maʔ. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕβaħun nħaʔ mʔijuw s~ɕa tajʦ~ʨju s~ɕjeŋ toŋs~ɕi ʦ~ʨju ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kja qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ, tjenlun, poaj, ʦ~ʨijo, takwan, ʦ~ʨjonkŋ, s~ɕlamaw ru piŋtŋ ms~ɕpat kwaraʔ njaʔ. kawas~ɕ **** te ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, s~ɕqunun nħaʔ s~ɕa ijus~ɕħan ʦ~ʨju nqu s~ɕħini s~ɕjaŋ ki nqu nkaw nqu renʔai s~ɕjaŋ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨuwŋβoŋ ʦ~ʨju, s~ɕβaħun nħaʔ mʔijuw s~ɕa tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕjeŋ ʦ~ʨuwŋβoŋ ʦ~ʨju ru ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kaws~ɕa ****, s~ɕmrjut s~ɕinʦ~ʨŋ ʦ~ʨjuəij ki qalaŋ inlaxan, ru s~ɕβaħul nħa mʔijuw nqu tajʦ~ʨu s~ɕjeŋ ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕlamaw nqu ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ, qalaŋ piŋtŋ tβʦ~ʨjun nħaʔ s~ɕmiʔ s~ɕqu "lis~ɕan ʦ~ʨjens~ɕje kwanli ʦ~ʨuj". kawas~ɕ **** te mpu s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te s~ɕaziŋ rjax ru muaħ mʔijuw makiʔ s~ɕa ħopiŋ s~ɕjaŋ lozi. kawas~ɕ **** te mpu s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te mpus~ɕal maɣal rjax, jalaw ɣi ms~ɕqun mqutux ʦ~ʨis~ɕja s~ɕi qu tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕjeŋ ki tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕi. ru ɣmlu mʔijuw tajʦ~ʨjoŋ s~ɕi ħopiŋ ʦ~ʨju, ru s~ɕi ɣlu uŋat qu laluʔ njaʔ ka "tiβaŋ ziʦ~ʨi" ru "tiβaŋ ziʦ~ʨi tiwe twnti" la. tuqi qs~ɕja s~ɕpjaŋ na ɣoŋ ħja ɣa "ɣoŋ taʦ~ʨja" ki "ɣoŋ taʔan". rħzjal kkiʔan qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ maki s~ɕa toŋpjen nqu tajʦ~ʨju. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki miaoli s~ɕjeŋ ʦ~ʨwolan, taiʔan, s~ɕinʦ~ʨik s~ɕjeŋ naħuj, ɣilan s~ɕjeŋ tatoŋ ka s~ɕkaħul toŋpjen ru s~ɕipen. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki ħwalan s~ɕjeŋ βs~ɕuriŋ, nanʔto s~ɕjeŋ kwos~ɕiŋ ka s~ɕkaħul toŋpjen ru nanpjen. qalaŋ pas~ɕiŋ ɣa ms~ɕoβiħ ki s~ɕins~ɕje ru toŋs~ɕi ka s~ɕipen.
